t1: AlphaFold 3 pLDDT scores showed the N-terminal is disordered, but that's one method. IUPred3 (ELTE Budapest) uses energy-based pairwise potentials to predict intrinsic disorder from sequence alone. It's algorithmically independent from AlphaFold. If both methods agree, the disorder finding is robust.
t2: IUPred3 long disorder prediction for Stereocilin (UniProt Q7RTU9). Scores above 0.5 (dashed line) = disordered. The N-terminal shows multiple disorder peaks; both the Mini-STRC region (700-1775, 2.5 % above threshold) and the Ultra-Mini region (1075-1775, 3.9 % above threshold) are solidly ordered. The two numbers are within IUPred3 smoothing noise — both constructs sit comfortably in the ordered-protein regime, and AF3 pTM (0.86 → 0.87) reinforces that the LRR-linker removal improves the overall fold.
t12: Red: in truncated region (removed). Blue: in Mini-STRC (retained, minor). The 676-696 stretch (21 residues) is the longest disordered region and sits exactly at the step-1 cut zone, confirming the 700 boundary. Ultra-Mini cuts further to 1075 — past all remaining minor disorder peaks in the LRR linker — leaving 1075-1775 fully ordered.
t13: Conclusion: Two algorithmically independent methods (AlphaFold 3 deep learning + IUPred3 energy-based potentials) produce convergent disorder profiles. Both identify residue 691 as the disorder peak and residue 700 as the order boundary. Mini-STRC (700-1775) is 2.5 % above IUPred3 threshold; Ultra-Mini (1075-1775) is 3.9 % — both within noise of each other, both solidly ordered. The AF3 signal (pTM 0.86 → 0.87) and absence of any structural domain disruption in the Ultra-Mini zone are the load-bearing fold scores. This cross-validation rules out the possibility that the disorder finding is an artefact of any single algorithm. Li et al. (2026) demonstrated that AF3 builds geometric constraints hierarchically through its Evoformer layers — disordered regions prevent stable constraint propagation, directly explaining why full STRC (with its disordered N-terminus) scores lower than either truncated construct.
t14: IUPred3 (Erdős et al. 2021, Nucleic Acids Research). UniProt Q7RTU9 (Stereocilin, Homo sapiens, 1775 aa). Long disorder mode, medium smoothing.
t30: 16. Independent disorder validation — Mini 2.5 % · Ultra 3.9 % · both solidly ordered IUPred3
